query: We checked the Kimi skill docs and Claude skill docs for discovery paths. Save the official citations so the next agent can reuse them.
reason: The user explicitly wants official docs evidence cached for future provider work.
expected_routing: Use official-ai-devdocs for lookup if needed, then cache compact evidence notes.

query: Before claiming .codex/skills works, check whether we already have a cached official Codex source for skill discovery.
reason: The task asks to reuse cached official documentation evidence for a provider discovery claim.
expected_routing: Inspect the cache first, refresh official docs if stale, then return source-linked claims.

query: The docs did not confirm that marketplace shape. Record that negative finding so future plugin work does not guess.
reason: Negative official-docs findings are part of the cache contract.
expected_routing: Create or update a cache note that marks the unsupported claim clearly.

query: Look up the latest Codex plugin documentation and tell me the correct manifest schema.
reason: The primary task is official docs lookup, not caching the evidence afterward.
expected_routing: Use official-ai-devdocs first; this skill may be used only after evidence should be saved.

query: Rewrite this README section to be clearer and shorter.
reason: General documentation editing does not involve provider-doc evidence caching.
expected_routing: Route to general docs editing or repo documentation skills.

query: Make a new skill that evaluates trigger behavior for my existing skills.
reason: Trigger eval generation is owned by skill-trigger-evalsmith.
